text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I drop by the dance studio one morning to find...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: One, two, three!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: One... two... Yaaaawn...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Come on, Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If you really want to be the best Umadol, you
need to work on your dancing.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...You're the one who asked me to be your
manager since we both have today off.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ngh. Yeah, I know... It's just...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Waking up at five is completely overdoing it! And
you made me run right after!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I know it's quite strict, but based on my
calculations last night, this is the most suitable
schedule for you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Up at 5:00 a.m. for three hours of running
practice—endurance also plays a critical role in
dancing, you know.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Uuuugh! You're so strict! Gahhh. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I have just one request. ☆ Can we make a promise
to take breaks and not push ourselves too hard?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No. You've had "just one request" ten times today
already. Besides—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BEEP, BEEP, BEEP, BEEP!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Time's up anyways.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, really?! Then, that means we're done
for today!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Okay, on to our next activity. Our afternoon
twenty-kilometer run will start in one minute.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Say what now?! We're running again?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I watched a popular TV show to learn some
tips. A very famous idol talked about it.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
She said, and I quote, "Idols need endurance.
They must be able to dance through pain while
keeping a smile on their face."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. I know you can reach such potential!
Now then, let us be off, Falcon!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Guh... Do you really mean that?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Then I have no choice but to do it! Ughhh! You
really are the manager from hell!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon is completely drowned in tasks by
her one-off manager, Eishin Flash.
